title: What Stocks To Buy During War? 4 Retail Stocks To Watch
text: Could retail stocks continue to rebound from their pandemic woes?

title: Why the Earnings Surprise Streak Could Continue for Kroger (KR)
text: Kroger (KR) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: A Trio of Defensive Stocks for the Value Investor
text: If you want to make your portfolio more resilient to recessions, the following defensive stocks may be suitable options. These businesses have continued to generate earnings and dividends during economic recessions as they offer goods and services on which people do not typically cut their spending, even in times of financial distress.

title: Kroger Earnings Preview: What to Watch
text: The supermarket giant announces its latest results in a few days.

title: Amazon, Kroger & Walmart Entering The Service Sector. Here's Why.
text: Major retailers, including Amazon, Kroger and Walmart, are selling their in-house innovations to other merchants, even though these services were created to better compete. However, the motivation behind selling these “goods” isn't simply money – it also can generate new forms of valuable data.

title: Pantene and Stubb's will be sold in reusable containers at some Kroger stores
text: If you walk into one of 25 Fred Meyer stores in the Portland area this week, you'll find something unusual.

title: Kroger's Fred Meyer Stores Launch Loop in Portland, Oregon Metro
text: CINCINNATI and TRENTON, N.J., Feb. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), America's largest grocery retailer, and Loop, the circular reuse platform developed by TerraCycle, have launched a new way for customers to shop, offering a selection of products in reusable packaging rather than in single-use plastic.

title: Kroger and Kitchen United Open Houston Location
text: HOUSTON, Feb. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kroger (NYSE: KR) and Kitchen United MIX announced today the opening of a kitchen center in Houston, Texas, located in The Heights neighborhood. Customers can order freshly prepared, on-demand restaurant meals from any or all participating restaurants to satisfy even the pickiest eaters.

title: Kroger to Host 2022 Business Update
text: CINCINNATI, Feb. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) announced today it will host a business update in Florida, including a tour of the Groveland Customer Fulfillment Center immediately following formal presentations on Friday, March 4, 2022. Kroger executives will provide an update on the company's strategic initiatives, including Leading with Fresh and Accelerating with Digital and the value creation model.

title: Kroger Fulfillment Network Expands to Oklahoma City, Oklahoma
text: OKLAHOMA CITY, Feb. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), America's largest grocery retailer, today announced it will offer more Americans delivery through the addition of a spoke facility in Oklahoma City powered by the Ocado Group (LSE: OCDO). As a continuation of Kroger's successful entry into Florida in 2021, Oklahoma will serve as another new geography for the company, bringing innovation and modern e-commerce to the area, extending the grocer's reach and ability to provide its customers anything, anytime, anywhere.

title: Kroger Announces Fourth Quarter Conference Call with Investors
text: CINCINNATI, Feb. 17, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) announced today it will host its fourth quarter 2021 earnings conference call at 10 a.m. ET on Thursday, March 3, 2022.

title: 7 Grocery Outlet Stocks That Will Benefit From The Rising Inflation Trend
text: Following the recent release of Consumer Price Index (CPI) data from January, inflation is flashing warning signs as prices soared 7.5% compare to a year ago, and have increased by 0.6% from the previous month. Telsey Advisory Group says the Food-At-Home CPI accelerated to 7.4%, with Food PPI remaining high in the double digits at 12.1%.

title: Technical Setup Makes Kroger Stock a Solid Bullish Pick
text: Grocery store stock Kroger Co (NYSE:KR) saw a downgrade from Citigroup on Jan. 28 and promptly formed a doji pattern.

title: The Kroger Co.: Defensive Stock, More A Hold Or Add Than Initial Buy
text: Kroger has delivered as expected after adding its then value-priced shares to our family portfolio two years ago as a defensive holding to an overheated market. The pandemic had a counter effect on the supermarket chain, driving a much-needed delivery model while challenging operations with food price inflation, supply chain disruptions, and labor woes.

title: 10 Stocks Warren Buffett Is Selling
text: Warren Buffett once again was a net seller of equities in the fourth quarter, slicing, slashing and outright exiting stakes across a series of sectors that have fallen out of his favor. But the Oracle of Omaha did pull off a few interesting buys in Q4, too.

title: Business Booms at Kroger-Owned Grocery Stores, but Workers Are Left Behind
text: A number of the stores' nearly 500,000 employees have reported being homeless, receiving government food stamps or relying on food banks.

title: Failed Experiments
text: We were watching CNBC recently and an analyst mentioned what practically nobody besides us has said. She called Amazon's ( AMZN , Financial) entry into the grocery business a “failed experiment.

title: Kroger Announces Leadership Changes
text: CINCINNATI, Feb. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) today announced the retirement of Mark Tuffin, senior vice president of retail divisions, after more than 26 years of distinguished service, effective April 1. Tuffin will be succeeded by Kenny Kimball, currently president of the Smith's division.

title: Blackhawk Expands Partnership With Kroger for More B2B Gift Cards
text: Global payments provider Blackhawk Network is expanding its partnership with Kroger to offer prepaid Mastercard and Visa cards in bulk through its Software-as-a-Service (SaaS)-based Velocity B2B gift card service, the companies announced Monday (Feb. 7). This offering will help boost Kroger's growth in the B2B gift card space, giving businesses a new way to reward […]

title: Kroger Delivery Arrives in Metro Atlanta
text: ATLANTA, Feb. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR), America's largest grocery retailer, today announced the official opening of the Customer Fulfillment Center (CFC) in Forest Park, GA, a city south of Atlanta, powered by Ocado Group (LSE: OCDO), a world leader in technology for grocery e-commerce. This marks an expansion of Kroger's national fulfillment network, providing the region with an e-commerce delivery service that combines vertical integration, machine learning, and robotics with affordable, friendly, and fast delivery of grocery items and fresh food.

title: Sports-Focused CBD Brand Level Select To Hit More Than 1,200 The Kroger Co. Stores Across The U.S.
text: Kadenwood LLC's sports performance-based CBD brand Level Select announced a broad-based distribution partnership with select The Kroger Co. KR stores nationally spanning over 1,200 locations. Level Select's relief and recovery CBD topicals will now be available in the largest grocery retail chain in the U.S., providing convenient access to quality CBD products at retail prices that consumers can afford.

title: 5 Cheap Dividend Growth Stocks to Bet Amid Volatility
text: Pfizer (PFE), Kroger (KR), Archer-Daniels (ADM), HP Inc. (HPQ) and Jones Lang (JLL) seems compelling cheap picks amid volatility.

title: Kroger's King Soopers union workers approve new contract
text: Workers at nearly 80 King Soopers, owned by Kroger Co, approved a new three-year contract, the Colorado-based chain said on Tuesday, ending a stalemate that had caused a 10-day strike at the start of the year.

title: Kroger Stock is a Teflon Consumer Staples Play
text: Grocery chain operator The Kroger Company (NYSE: KR) stock has been faring better than the benchmark indexes during the market sell-off of 2022.
